ggcube 0.1.0.9000

    • Surfaces
    • Lighting and shading
    • Animated and interactive rotation
  • Changelog

Animation renderers for animate_3d

Source: R/animate-3d.R
renderers_3d.Rd

Renderer functions that combine individual frame images into a final animation file. These are factory functions that return the actual rendering function.

Usage

gifski_renderer_3d(file = NULL, loop = TRUE)

av_renderer_3d(file = NULL, vfilter = "null", codec = NULL)

file_renderer_3d(dir = tempdir(), prefix = "ggcube_frame", overwrite = FALSE)

Arguments

file

Output file path. If NULL, a temporary file is used.

loop

Logical. Should the GIF loop? Default is TRUE.

vfilter

A video filter string for ffmpeg (passed to av).

codec

Video codec name. Default lets av choose.

dir

Directory to copy frame files into. Defaults to a session temporary directory (tempdir()). For animations you want to keep, pass an explicit directory.

prefix

Filename prefix for copied frame files.

overwrite

Logical. Overwrite existing files? Default is FALSE.

Value

A function with signature function(frames, fps, width, height) that produces the animation output.

Examples

# \donttest{
p <- ggplot() +
  geom_function_3d(
    fun = function(x, y) sin(x) * cos(y),
    xlim = c(-pi, pi), ylim = c(-pi, pi),
    fill = "steelblue", color = "steelblue") +
  coord_3d()

# GIF output (default)
animate_3d(p, yaw = c(0, 360), renderer = gifski_renderer_3d())
#> Rendering 100 frames...
#> Assembling animation...

# Video output
animate_3d(p, yaw = c(0, 360), renderer = av_renderer_3d())
#> Rendering 100 frames...
#> Assembling animation...

# Keep individual frame files in a chosen directory
animate_3d(p, yaw = c(0, 360),
    renderer = file_renderer_3d(dir = file.path(tempdir(), "my_frames")))
#> Rendering 100 frames...
#> Assembling animation...
#>   [1] "/tmp/RtmpiDmMtL/my_frames/ggcube_frame_0001.png"
#>   [2] "/tmp/RtmpiDmMtL/my_frames/ggcube_frame_0002.png"
#>   [3] "/tmp/RtmpiDmMtL/my_frames/ggcube_frame_0003.png"
#>   [4] "/tmp/RtmpiDmMtL/my_frames/ggcube_frame_0004.png"
#>   [5] "/tmp/RtmpiDmMtL/my_frames/ggcube_frame_0005.png"
#>   [6] "/tmp/RtmpiDmMtL/my_frames/ggcube_frame_0006.png"
#>   [7] "/tmp/RtmpiDmMtL/my_frames/ggcube_frame_0007.png"
#>   [8] "/tmp/RtmpiDmMtL/my_frames/ggcube_frame_0008.png"
#>   [9] "/tmp/RtmpiDmMtL/my_frames/ggcube_frame_0009.png"
#>  [10] "/tmp/RtmpiDmMtL/my_frames/ggcube_frame_0010.png"
#>  [11] "/tmp/RtmpiDmMtL/my_frames/ggcube_frame_0011.png"
#>  [12] "/tmp/RtmpiDmMtL/my_frames/ggcube_frame_0012.png"
#>  [13] "/tmp/RtmpiDmMtL/my_frames/ggcube_frame_0013.png"
#>  [14] "/tmp/RtmpiDmMtL/my_frames/ggcube_frame_0014.png"
